act_1_step_1.title: Escape The Riverbank
act_1_step_1.description: Having narrowly escaped execution by Count Geonor's forces - evading The Executioner by leaping into the ocean - you wash ashore in the primordial forests of Ogham. Corruption and disease fester in every shadowed corner of this ancient land. Fight your way through The Riverbank and defeat The Bloated Miller to reach Clearfell Encampment, your first safe haven.

objectives.text: Navigate The Riverbank and defeat The Bloated Miller
objectives.details: Follow the path through The Riverbank. The Bloated Miller guards the exit to Clearfell Encampment.

act_1_step_2.title: Explore Clearfell Encampment
act_1_step_2.description: Clearfell Encampment is your first town hub. Speak with the NPCs to learn about the area, then head into Clearfell to continue your adventure.

objectives.text: Speak with NPCs and enter Clearfell
objectives.details: Take a moment to talk to the NPCs in town, then find the exit to Clearfell.

act_1_step_3.title: Navigate Clearfell
act_1_step_3.description: Clearfell is a forest zone infested with enemies. Defeat the boss Beira of the Rotten Pack, then find the exit to The Grelwood. Several optional encounters offer bonus rewards.

objectives.text: Find and defeat Beira of the Rotten Pack
objectives.details: Beira is always located to the north/northeast of the waypoint.

objectives.text: Find the exit to The Grelwood
objectives.details: Explore the zone to locate the path leading to The Grelwood.
objectives.notes: If you find the exit first, continue searching for Beira. Use the checkpoint to quickly return to the exit afterward.

objectives.text: Find the Mysterious Campsite
objectives.details: A hidden campsite somewhere in the zone with a reward.

objectives.text: Find and enter the Mud Burrow to slay The Devourer
objectives.details: A side dungeon containing The Devourer boss.

act_1_step_4.title: Explore The Grelwood
act_1_step_4.description: The Grelwood is a sprawling forest with multiple exits. Meet Una, discover the paths to The Grim Tangle and The Red Vale, and complete optional encounters for bonus rewards before heading to The Red Vale.

objectives.text: Find the waypoint and speak with Una
objectives.details: Una is located near the center of the zone, close to the waypoint.

objectives.text: Discover the exit to The Grim Tangle
objectives.details: Enter The Grim Tangle briefly to activate its waypoint, then return to The Grelwood to continue exploring.

objectives.text: Find the exit to The Red Vale and proceed
objectives.details: Once you've discovered The Grim Tangle waypoint, find and enter The Red Vale to continue the main quest.

objectives.text: Find and defeat Brambleghast
objectives.details: An optional boss encounter hidden somewhere in the forest.

objectives.text: Find the Witch Hut and loot the Cauldron
objectives.details: Defeat the witch inside the hut and interact with the cauldron for flask rewards.

act_1_step_5.title: Conquer The Red Vale
act_1_step_5.description: The Red Vale contains three obelisks that must be completed, each guarded by enemies and dropping a runed quest item. After completing all obelisks, defeat The Rust King boss and portal back to Clearfell Encampment.

objectives.text: Complete the three obelisks and collect the runed items
objectives.details: Each obelisk drops a quest item: the Runed Girdle, Runed Guard, and Runed Skull Cap. Collect all three.

objectives.text: Defeat The Rust King
objectives.details: The Rust King is the main boss of The Red Vale.

objectives.text: Portal back to Clearfell Encampment
objectives.details: Use a portal to return to town after defeating The Rust King.

act_1_step_6.title: Get Runic Tools from Renly
act_1_step_6.description: Back in Clearfell Encampment, speak with Renly to receive the Runic Tools. These tools are needed to complete the ritual in The Grelwood.

objectives.text: Speak with Renly to obtain the Runic Tools
objectives.details: Renly will give you the Runic Tools after you've collected the runed items from The Red Vale.

objectives.text: Use the waypoint to travel to The Grelwood
objectives.details: Take the waypoint back to The Grelwood to perform the runic ritual.

act_1_step_7.title: Perform the Runic Ritual
act_1_step_7.description: Use the Runic Tools to impale the three runes on the tree roots scattered throughout The Grelwood. After completing the ritual, speak with Una and return to town.

objectives.text: Use the Runic Tools to impale the three runes on the tree roots
objectives.details: Find the three tree roots with runes and use the Runic Tools to impale spikes on each one.

objectives.text: Speak with Una after completing the ritual
objectives.details: Una will have dialogue once all three runes are impaled.

objectives.text: Use the waypoint to return to Clearfell Encampment
objectives.details: Head back to town to continue the story.

act_1_step_8.title: Journey to The Grim Tangle
act_1_step_8.description: With the runic ritual complete, speak with Una in Clearfell Encampment to advance the story, then take the waypoint to The Grim Tangle.

objectives.text: Speak with Una, then take the waypoint to The Grim Tangle
objectives.details: Una will update you on the next steps. Use the waypoint to travel to The Grim Tangle.

act_1_step_9.title: Navigate The Grim Tangle
act_1_step_9.description: The Grim Tangle is a dark, twisted forest. Speak with Una near the entrance, then make your way through to find the exit to the Cemetery of the Eternals. An optional boss lurks within.

objectives.text: Speak with Una, then find the exit to the Cemetery of the Eternals
objectives.details: Una is located near the zone entrance. After speaking with her, explore the zone to find the path to the cemetery.

objectives.text: Find and defeat The Rotten Druid
objectives.details: An optional boss hidden in The Grim Tangle.

act_1_step_10.title: Clear the Cemetery of the Eternals
act_1_step_10.description: This ancient burial ground holds the remains of Eternal nobility - remnants of the empire that once ruled these lands before centuries of conflict with the Ezomyte people. Defeat Draven the Eternal Praetor in the Mausoleum and his consort Asinia in the Tomb. After collecting their quest items, unlock the central gate and defeat Lachlann of Endless Lament to proceed.

objectives.text: Find the Mausoleum of the Praetor and defeat Draven, the Eternal Praetor
objectives.details: Draven drops a quest item needed to unlock the central gate.

objectives.text: Find the Tomb of the Consort and defeat Asinia, the Praetor's Consort
objectives.details: Asinia drops a quest item needed to unlock the central gate.
objectives.notes: After defeating both bosses, use the checkpoint to return to the zone entrance, then use the waypoint to quickly get back to the cemetery.

objectives.text: Unlock the central gate and defeat Lachlann of Endless Lament
objectives.details: Use the quest items to unlock the gate. Follow the NPC and defeat Lachlann, then enter the Hunting Grounds.

objectives.text: Find the sarcophagus by the 'Grieving Epitaph'
objectives.details: A hidden sarcophagus with a ring reward.

act_1_step_11.title: Explore the Hunting Grounds
act_1_step_11.description: Once the private hunting preserve of Eternal nobility, these grounds are now overrun with the restless dead from the ancient war between the Eternal Empire and the Ezomyte people. Defeat Crowbell for skill points, then discover the exits to Freythorn and Ogham Farmlands. Several optional encounters offer bonus rewards.

objectives.text: Find and defeat Crowbell
objectives.details: Crowbell is an enemy in this zone. Defeating it grants 2 skill points.

objectives.text: Discover the exit to Freythorn
objectives.details: Enter Freythorn briefly to activate its waypoint, then return to the Hunting Grounds.
objectives.notes: If you've already discovered Ogham Farmlands, proceed directly to the next step.

objectives.text: Discover the exit to Ogham Farmlands
objectives.details: Enter Ogham Farmlands briefly to activate its waypoint.
objectives.notes: If you've already discovered Freythorn, use the waypoint to travel there.

objectives.text: Complete the Ritual Site
objectives.details: An optional encounter with a skill gem reward.

objectives.text: Complete the Dryad Encounter
objectives.details: An optional encounter with a support gem reward.

act_1_step_12.title: Complete the Freythorn Rituals
act_1_step_12.description: Freythorn contains four ritual sites that must be completed. The fourth ritual summons The King in the Mists, a boss that must be defeated to progress.

objectives.text: Complete the four ritual sites
objectives.details: Find and complete each of the four rituals scattered throughout Freythorn.

objectives.text: Defeat The King in the Mists at the fourth ritual
objectives.details: The boss spawns when you complete the fourth ritual.

objectives.text: Portal to town and waypoint to Ogham Farmlands
objectives.details: After defeating the boss, use a portal to return to town, then take the waypoint to Ogham Farmlands.

act_1_step_13.title: Traverse Ogham Farmlands
act_1_step_13.description: Make your way through the Ogham Farmlands to find Una's Lute and locate the entrance to Ogham Village. An optional encounter awaits at the Crop Circle.

objectives.text: Find Una's Lute
objectives.details: The lute is located inside a hut near the center of the zone. Collecting it grants skill points.

objectives.text: Find the entrance to Ogham Village
objectives.details: Explore the farmlands to locate the path to Ogham Village.

objectives.text: Find the Crop Circle and defeat the rare monster
objectives.details: An optional encounter in the farmlands with a skill gem reward.

act_1_step_14.title: Clear Ogham Village
act_1_step_14.description: Once a thriving settlement, Ogham Village now lies in ruins - another casualty of centuries of conflict in these lands. Count Geonor's forces have overrun what remains. Defeat The Executioner, rescue the prisoner, and make your way to The Manor Ramparts. Optionally find the Smithing Tools to unlock the Salvage Bench.

objectives.text: Find the Smithing Tools
objectives.details: The Smithing Tools unlock the Salvage Bench for item crafting.
objectives.notes: Only needs to be completed on your first character per league.

objectives.text: Defeat The Executioner
objectives.details: A boss located in the village that must be killed to progress.

objectives.text: Rescue the prisoner, speak with her, then enter The Manor Ramparts
objectives.details: Free the prisoner and talk to her before proceeding to the next zone.

act_1_step_15.title: Navigate The Manor Ramparts
act_1_step_15.description: The Manor Ramparts surround Ogham Manor. Navigate along the ramparts to find the entrance to the manor. An optional gallows encounter offers a skill gem reward.

objectives.text: Find and enter Ogham Manor
objectives.details: Navigate the ramparts to locate the manor entrance. The path generally leads in the direction of the waypoint.

objectives.text: Find the gallows
objectives.details: An optional encounter on the ramparts with a skill gem reward.

act_1_step_16.title: Clear Ogham Manor
act_1_step_16.description: Ogham Manor is a multi-floor dungeon housing the Iron Count himself. Track down Count Geonor, who stole the Seed of Corruption - the artifact you've been pursuing since your escape. Defeat Candlemass on the first floor and Count Geonor on the third floor, then return to Clearfell Encampment.

objectives.text: Defeat Candlemass, the Living Rite on the first floor
objectives.details: Candlemass is located on the first floor of the manor.
objectives.notes: If you find the stairs to the upper floors first, activate the checkpoint, then return. After killing Candlemass, use the checkpoint to continue upward.

objectives.text: Defeat Count Geonor on the third floor
objectives.details: The Iron Count fights first with confidence, then with wild desperation as you wear him down. In his final moments, he transforms into a twisted wolf - don't let your guard down during this phase.
objectives.notes: Watch for his transformation into a werewolf form at low health.

objectives.text: Return to Clearfell Encampment
objectives.details: Use a portal to return to town after defeating both bosses.

act_1_step_17.title: Depart for Act 2
act_1_step_17.description: Though Geonor is defeated, the Seed of Corruption remains beyond your grasp - Countess Oriana escaped with it during the battle, fleeing toward the Vastiri Plains. Return to Clearfell Encampment to wrap up Act 1, then pursue Oriana into the desert.

objectives.text: Speak with Una, Renly, and The Hooded One
objectives.details: Check in with the key NPCs in Clearfell Encampment before departing.

objectives.text: Talk to The Hooded One to depart for Act 2
objectives.details: The Hooded One will transport you to Vastiri Outskirts to begin your pursuit of Oriana and the Seed of Corruption.

act_2_step_1.title: Defeat Rathbreaker and Enter The Ardura Caravan
act_2_step_1.description: Welcome to the Vastiri region - once a lush and verdant land, now better known for its crimson sands, blackened wastelands, and harsh saltflats. Nomadic caravans traverse this unforgiving terrain in search of trade routes and oases. Begin Act 2 by finding and defeating Rathbreaker in Vastiri Outskirts, then join The Ardura Caravan.

objectives.text: Find and kill Rathbreaker
objectives.notes: Follow the perimeter of the map until you find a long skinny passageway.

objectives.text: Portal back to camp, enter The Ardura Caravan
objectives.details: Can also go ESC - respawn at checkpoint

act_2_step_2.title: Explore The Ardura Caravan
act_2_step_2.description: The Ardura Caravan serves as your main hub for Act 2. You've allied with the Ardura faction against the rival Faridun - a conflict that will shape your journey through the desert. Speak with the NPCs to unlock quests and services, then use the desert map to begin your journey to Mawdun Quarry.

objectives.text: Speak with all NPCs in The Ardura Caravan
objectives.details: Talk to everyone to unlock available quests and vendor services.

objectives.text: Use the desert map to travel to Mawdun Quarry
objectives.details: The desert map is located in the caravan and allows fast travel to different zones in Act 2.

act_2_step_3.title: Navigate Mawdun Quarry
act_2_step_3.description: Make your way through Mawdun Quarry toward the mine entrance. The quarry is a linear zone with checkpoints guiding the path forward.

objectives.text: Follow the checkpoints through the quarry to reach Mawdun Mine
objectives.details: The quarry is mostly linear - follow the checkpoints and they will lead you to the mine entrance.

act_2_step_4.title: Defeat Rudja in Mawdun Mine
act_2_step_4.description: Descend into Mawdun Mine to confront and defeat Rudja. After the battle, speak with Risu who will join your caravan.

objectives.text: Navigate the mine and defeat Rudja
objectives.details: Follow the mine tunnels to find Rudja's location.

objectives.text: Speak with Risu after the fight, then portal back to The Ardura Caravan
objectives.details: Risu will have dialogue after Rudja is defeated. Use a portal to return to town.

act_2_step_5.title: Travel to The Halani Gates
act_2_step_5.description: Back at The Ardura Caravan, check in with Risu before continuing your journey. Use the desert map to travel to The Halani Gates.

objectives.text: Speak with Risu, then use the desert map to travel to The Halani Gates
objectives.details: Risu is located in the caravan. After speaking with her, interact with the desert map to select The Halani Gates as your destination.

act_2_step_6.title: Unlock Traitor's Passage
act_2_step_6.description: At The Halani Gates, speak with Asala to learn about the situation. Return to The Ardura Caravan to consult with Risu, then speak with Asala again to unlock the path to Traitor's Passage.

objectives.text: Speak with Asala at The Halani Gates
objectives.details: Asala will tell you about what lies ahead.

objectives.text: Return to The Ardura Caravan and speak with Risu
objectives.details: Use the waypoint to return to the caravan and consult with Risu.

objectives.text: Speak with Asala again, then travel to Traitor's Passage
objectives.details: After speaking with Asala, use the desert map to travel to Traitor's Passage.

act_2_step_7.title: Navigate Traitor's Passage
act_2_step_7.description: Traitor's Passage is a winding underground area. Defeat the boss Basala and collect the Djinn Barya quest item, then find your way to the exit leading back to The Halani Gates.

objectives.text: Find and defeat Basala
objectives.details: Look for paper on the walls - this means you're getting close to Basala. Pick up the Djinn Barya quest item after defeating her.

objectives.text: Find the exit to The Halani Gates
objectives.details: Stairs leading up indicate you're heading the right way toward the exit.

objectives.text: Find and loot the Bell Chest
objectives.details: Located in a dead end with a checkpoint. Look for monsters and gold already on the ground nearby.

act_2_step_8.title: Confront Jamanra the Risen King
act_2_step_8.description: Back at The Halani Gates, you must confront Jamanra the Risen King - who now possesses the Seed of Corruption that Oriana carried into the desert. Navigate the zone by unlocking three gates, then fight Jamanra. He escapes before you can finish him, taking the Seed with him. You'll encounter him again at the climax of this act.

objectives.text: Navigate the zone and unlock all three gates
objectives.details: Stay close to the canyon edge. You'll need to cross the canyon and unlock three gates to reach the boss.

objectives.text: Fight Jamanra the Risen King
objectives.details: Confront Jamanra in his arena. He will escape before you can defeat him - you'll face him again later in the act.

objectives.text: Go down the stairs and head to the bottom right of the zone
objectives.details: After Jamanra escapes, navigate to the exit area and activate the checkpoint before returning to the caravan.

objectives.text: Find the impaled corpses and defeat the rare monster
objectives.details: Look for the impaled corpses in the zone. Defeating the rare monster that spawns there rewards you with a few chests.

objectives.text: Return to The Ardura Caravan
objectives.details: Use a portal to return to town.

act_2_step_9.title: Turn in Quests and Unlock Keth
act_2_step_9.description: Back at The Ardura Caravan, complete Zarka's quest for rewards and unlock access to the Trial of Sekhemas. Then speak with the NPCs and travel to Keth.

objectives.text: Speak with Zarka to complete her quest
objectives.details: Turn in the quest items to Zarka for skill gem rewards.

objectives.text: Use the desert map to discover the Trial of Sekhemas
objectives.details: Enter the trial area to activate its waypoint, then return to town. You can complete the first ascendancy trial whenever you're ready.

objectives.text: Speak with all NPCs, then travel to Keth
objectives.details: Use the desert map to travel to Keth.

act_2_step_10.title: Explore Keth
act_2_step_10.description: Keth is an ancient desert city infested with snake creatures. Defeat Kabala, the Constrictor Queen, collect the Kabala Clan relic from the snake monsters, and find the exit to The Lost City.

objectives.text: Defeat Kabala, the Constrictor Queen
objectives.details: Kabala is located roughly in the middle of the zone.

objectives.text: Collect the Kabala Clan relic from snake monsters
objectives.details: Kill snake enemies until one drops the relic. It can also drop in The Lost City if you miss it here.

objectives.text: Find the exit to The Lost City
objectives.details: The exit is located at the bottom right of the zone, after crossing a large bridge. Activate the checkpoint before proceeding.

act_2_step_11.title: Traverse The Lost City
act_2_step_11.description: The Lost City is a ruined underground area. Navigate through to find the exit to The Buried Shrines. Optional treasures include the Golden Tomb and the Ninth Treasure of Keth.

objectives.text: Find the exit to The Buried Shrines
objectives.details: Explore the ruins to locate the path forward.

objectives.text: Find the Golden Tomb
objectives.details: A hidden tomb with a spirit gem reward.

objectives.text: Find the Ninth Treasure of Keth
objectives.details: Look for a large gilded beetle. The event appears as 'The Galleria' on the map.

act_2_step_12.title: Explore The Buried Shrines and Conquer the Heart of Keth
act_2_step_12.description: The Buried Shrines contain the entrance to the Heart of Keth, a boss arena where you'll face Azarian the Forsaken Son. Complete optional encounters for rewards, defeat the boss, and perform the goddess ritual to obtain the Essence of Water.

objectives.text: Find and loot the guarded sarcophagus
objectives.details: A sarcophagus guarded by enemies with a support gem reward.

objectives.text: Complete the Elemental Offering Event
objectives.details: An optional event that rewards a resistance ring. A ruby ring is recommended for the upcoming boss fight.

objectives.text: Find the entrance to the Heart of Keth
objectives.details: Explore the shrines to locate the path to the Heart of Keth.

objectives.text: Defeat Azarian the Forsaken Son
objectives.details: A challenging boss fight - fire resistance helps here.

objectives.text: Complete the goddess ritual
objectives.details: Speak with the goddess, loot the cinders, burn the goddess, then collect the Essence of Water.

objectives.text: Return to The Ardura Caravan
objectives.details: Use a portal to return to town.

act_2_step_14.title: Travel to Mastodon Badlands
act_2_step_14.description: Back at The Ardura Caravan, speak with Zarka to turn in your quest and receive rewards. Then use the desert map to travel to the Mastodon Badlands.

objectives.text: Speak with Zarka to complete her quest
objectives.details: Turn in the Essence of Water to Zarka for a support gem reward.

objectives.text: Use the desert map to travel to Mastodon Badlands
objectives.details: Select Mastodon Badlands from the desert map to continue your journey.

act_2_step_15.title: Navigate Mastodon Badlands
act_2_step_15.description: Explore the Mastodon Badlands, a vast desert area filled with hyena enemies. You'll need to discover both the Lightless Passage and The Bone Pits exits, grabbing the waypoints in each before proceeding.

objectives.text: Find the Lightless Passage entrance and take the waypoint
objectives.details: Search the zone for the Lightless Passage entrance. Enter, activate the waypoint, then return to the Mastodon Badlands.

objectives.text: Find the exit to The Bone Pits and take the waypoint
objectives.details: Locate the zone exit leading to The Bone Pits. Enter, activate the waypoint, then return to the Mastodon Badlands.

objectives.text: Kill hyena enemies to find the Sun Clan relic
objectives.details: Hyenas have a chance to drop the Sun Clan relic. Don't stress if you don't find it here - it's more common in The Bone Pits.

objectives.text: Find and loot the Shrine of Bones
objectives.details: Look for a rare effigy near a checkpoint. It rewards an uncut support gem.

act_2_step_15b.title: Complete the Lightless Passage
act_2_step_15b.description: Navigate through the Lightless Passage to find the Well of Souls. Speak with the Lurking Creature inside, then use the waypoint to continue to The Bone Pits.

objectives.text: Find and enter the Well of Souls
objectives.details: Navigate through the Lightless Passage to locate the entrance to the Well of Souls.

objectives.text: Speak with the Lurking Creature
objectives.details: Find and speak with the Lurking Creature inside the Well of Souls.

objectives.text: Use the waypoint to travel to The Bone Pits
objectives.details: Use the waypoint in the Well of Souls to travel to The Bone Pits.

act_2_step_16.title: Clear The Bone Pits
act_2_step_16.description: The Bone Pits is a dangerous cavern area. Your goals here are to defeat the zone boss to obtain a horn, and collect the Sun Clan relic from hyena enemies. Once both are obtained, portal back to town.

objectives.text: Defeat the zone boss and loot the horn
objectives.details: Find and kill the boss at the end of The Bone Pits. Make sure to loot the horn from its corpse.

objectives.text: Obtain the Sun Clan relic from hyena enemies
objectives.details: Continue killing hyenas throughout the zone until one drops the Sun Clan relic. This is a required quest item.

objectives.text: Portal back to The Ardura Caravan
objectives.details: Once you have both the horn and the Sun Clan relic, use a portal to return to town.

act_2_step_17.title: Travel to Valley of the Titans
act_2_step_17.description: Back at The Ardura Caravan, speak with Zarka to turn in your quest items (horn and Sun Clan relic) and receive rewards. Then use the desert map to travel to The Valley of the Titans.

objectives.text: Speak with Zarka to turn in the horn and Sun Clan relic
objectives.details: Turn in both quest items to Zarka to complete her quest and receive an uncut support gem reward.

objectives.text: Use the desert map to travel to The Valley of the Titans
objectives.details: Select The Valley of the Titans from the desert map to continue your journey.

act_2_step_18.title: Navigate Valley of the Titans
act_2_step_18.description: The Valley of the Titans is a sacred area with ancient seals and a medallion that grants permanent buffs. Explore the area to activate three ancient seals, then place your relics in the medallion to choose a buff.

objectives.text: Find and activate all three ancient seals
objectives.details: Explore the valley and click on each of the three ancient seals scattered throughout the zone.

objectives.text: Place the relics in the medallion and choose a buff
objectives.details: Find the medallion near the waypoint and place your two relics inside. You'll be able to choose one of two permanent buffs - don't worry, you can change your choice later at any time.

objectives.text: Find the exit to Titan Grotto
objectives.details: Continue exploring until you find the zone exit leading to Titan Grotto.

act_2_step_19.title: Clear Titan Grotto
act_2_step_19.description: Titan Grotto is a dungeon containing a powerful boss. Navigate through the grotto and defeat the boss to complete this area.

objectives.text: Navigate through Titan Grotto and defeat the boss
objectives.details: Make your way through the grotto until you reach the boss arena. Defeat the boss to complete the area.

objectives.text: Portal back to The Ardura Caravan
objectives.details: After defeating the boss, use a portal to return to town.

act_2_step_20.title: Travel to Deshar
act_2_step_20.description: Complete your business at The Ardura Caravan by speaking with Zarka and Asala, then make your way to Deshar via The Halani Gates. You'll need to sound a horn to unlock the path forward.

objectives.text: Speak with Zarka, then Asala
objectives.details: Talk to Zarka to turn in your quest, then speak with Asala. You'll receive an uncut support gem as a reward.

objectives.text: Use the desert map to travel to The Halani Gates
objectives.details: Open the desert map and select The Halani Gates as your destination.

objectives.text: Sound the horn at the front of the caravan
objectives.details: Find the horn at the front of the caravan and interact with it to summon the caravan.

objectives.text: Use the desert map to travel to Deshar
objectives.details: Once the path is unlocked, use the desert map to travel to Deshar.

act_2_step_21.title: Explore Deshar
act_2_step_21.description: Deshar is a ruined city with important quest items to find. You'll encounter an abandoned rhoa, collect the final letter from a corpse, and then make your way to The Path of Mourning.

objectives.text: Interact with the abandoned rhoa
objectives.details: Find and talk to the abandoned rhoa. It's the right thing to do!

objectives.text: Find the final letter on a corpse
objectives.details: Search near a big tower for a corpse on the ground that has the final letter. This completes a quest worth 2 skill points.
rewards: 2 skill points on quest turn in

objectives.text: Find the exit to The Path of Mourning
objectives.details: Locate the exit and enter The Path of Mourning. Grab the waypoint inside, then backtrack to Deshar to continue.

objectives.text: Find The Forgotten Hollow and loot the corpse
objectives.details: Search Deshar for The Forgotten Hollow location and loot the corpse inside for an Artificer's Orb.

act_2_step_22.title: Navigate The Path of Mourning
act_2_step_22.description: The Path of Mourning is a transitional zone leading to The Spires of Deshar. Make your way through the area to find the exit.

objectives.text: Traverse The Path of Mourning to reach The Spires of Deshar
objectives.details: Navigate through the zone until you find the exit leading to The Spires of Deshar.

act_2_step_23.title: Clear The Spires of Deshar
act_2_step_23.description: The Spires of Deshar is a dangerous area with powerful enemies. You'll encounter the Sisters of Garukhan who grant a resistance buff, and must defeat the boss Tor Gul the Defiler.

objectives.text: Find and interact with the Sisters of Garukhan
objectives.details: Search the area to find the Sisters of Garukhan. Speaking with them grants a permanent 10% lightning resistance buff.

objectives.text: Defeat Tor Gul, the Defiler
objectives.details: Find and kill Tor Gul, the boss of this zone. He's a powerful enemy so be prepared for a tough fight.

objectives.text: Portal back to The Ardura Caravan
objectives.details: After defeating Tor Gul, use a portal to return to town.

act_2_step_24.title: Travel to The Dreadnought
act_2_step_24.description: Back at The Ardura Caravan, turn in the final letter you collected in Deshar to receive skill points. The time has come to pursue Jamanra to his stronghold. Speak with the NPCs, then use the desert map to travel to The Dreadnought - where the final confrontation awaits.

objectives.text: Turn in the final letter to Shambrin
objectives.details: Speak with Shambrin to turn in the final letter you found on a corpse in Deshar. This grants 2 skill points.
objectives.notes: This is the second batch of 2 skill points from the letter quest chain.

objectives.text: Speak with NPCs and travel to The Dreadnought
objectives.details: Talk to any NPCs with quest markers, then use the desert map to travel to The Dreadnought.

act_2_step_25.title: Navigate The Dreadnought
act_2_step_25.description: The Dreadnought is a massive shipwreck - a colossal vessel beached in the desert sands, now serving as Jamanra's stronghold. Navigate through the wreckage to find the exit leading to The Dreadnought Vanguard where your quarry awaits.

objectives.text: Navigate through The Dreadnought to reach The Dreadnought Vanguard
objectives.details: Explore the shipwreck and find the exit leading to The Dreadnought Vanguard. The act boss is in the next zone.

act_2_step_26.title: Defeat Jamara, the Abomination
act_2_step_26.description: The Dreadnought Vanguard contains Jamara, the Abomination - the twisted form Jamanra has taken after corrupting himself with the Seed's power. Defeat this abomination to reclaim the Seed of Corruption and complete your mission in the Vastiri.

objectives.text: Defeat Jamara, the Abomination
objectives.details: Navigate through The Dreadnought Vanguard until you reach Jamara's arena. He's a challenging boss - prepare for a tough fight.

objectives.text: Portal back to The Ardura Caravan
objectives.details: After defeating Jamara, use a portal to return to town.

act_2_step_27.title: Complete Act 2
act_2_step_27.description: With Jamara defeated, it's time to wrap up Act 2 and prepare for the next chapter. You'll meet a mysterious figure before departing with the caravan to Act 3.

objectives.text: Leave the Caravan and speak with The Hooded One
objectives.details: Exit The Ardura Caravan to find The Hooded One waiting outside. Speak with this mysterious figure to learn more about your journey.

objectives.text: Return to the Caravan and speak with Asala
objectives.details: Go back to The Ardura Caravan and talk to Asala. She will transport you to the next act.

act_3_step_1.title: Navigate Sandswept Marsh
act_3_step_1.description: You've entered the jungles of the inner continent, where the decaying ziggurats of the ancient Vaal civilization - once the pinnacle of power and achievement - now crumble beneath the canopy. Make your way through the dangerous Sandswept Marsh to find Ziggurat Encampment, the main town for this act. Several optional encounters offer valuable rewards along the way.

objectives.text: Find the exit to Ziggurat Encampment
objectives.details: Navigate through the marsh to locate the exit leading to the town.

objectives.text: Find and kill Rootredge
objectives.details: An optional boss encounter that rewards a skill gem.

objectives.text: Find the Azak Campfire and loot the rare basket
objectives.details: Locate the orok campsite called 'Azak Campfire' and defeat the two rare enemies guarding it.

objectives.text: Find the hanging tree and loot the magic corpse
objectives.details: Search for a hanging tree with a lootable corpse nearby.

act_3_step_2.title: Explore Ziggurat Encampment
act_3_step_2.description: Ziggurat Encampment is built within the shadow of ancient Vaal ruins - a testament to the civilization that once ruled these jungles under Queen Atziri's command. Speak with the NPCs to learn about your objectives, then exit into the Jungle Ruins to begin exploring.

objectives.text: Speak with the NPCs in Ziggurat Encampment
objectives.details: Talk to the various NPCs to receive quests and learn about the area.

objectives.text: Exit into the Jungle Ruins
objectives.details: Leave the encampment through the exit leading to the Jungle Ruins.

act_3_step_3.title: Explore Jungle Ruins
act_3_step_3.description: The Jungle Ruins is a hub zone with multiple exits. You'll need to discover the exits to Venom Crypts and Infested Barrens, and defeat The Mighty Silverfist for skill points. Don't enter the side zones yet - just grab their waypoints.

objectives.text: Find the exit to Venom Crypts and take the checkpoint
objectives.details: Locate the Venom Crypts entrance. The checkpoint is outside the entrance, so no need to enter - just grab it and continue exploring.

objectives.text: Defeat The Mighty Silverfist
objectives.details: Find and kill The Mighty Silverfist boss for 2 skill points.

objectives.text: Find the exit to Infested Barrens
objectives.details: If you've already grabbed the Venom Crypts waypoint, continue into Infested Barrens. Otherwise, take the waypoint here and go back to grab the Venom Crypts waypoint first.

objectives.text: Find the Troubled Camp
objectives.details: A hidden camp in the Jungle Ruins containing a merchant NPC and multiple chests.

objectives.text: Find the Ravaged Corpse and speak with Servi
objectives.details: Located near a checkpoint. Loot the corpse to summon Servi, then speak with her to receive a reward.

act_3_step_4.title: Explore Infested Barrens
act_3_step_4.description: The Infested Barrens is another hub zone with multiple exits to discover. Find all three exits and grab their waypoints before returning to Jungle Ruins.

objectives.text: Find the exit to Chimeral Wetlands and take the waypoint
objectives.details: Enter Chimeral Wetlands, activate the waypoint, then backtrack to Infested Barrens.

objectives.text: Find the exit to Azak Bog and take the waypoint
objectives.details: Enter Azak Bog, activate the waypoint, then backtrack to Infested Barrens.

objectives.text: Find the exit to Matlan Waterways
objectives.details: The Infested Barrens waypoint is located near this exit. Activate both.

objectives.text: Use a portal to return to Jungle Ruins
objectives.details: After discovering all exits and waypoints, portal back to Jungle Ruins to continue.

objectives.text: Find the Troubled Camp
objectives.details: A hidden camp in the Infested Barrens containing the merchant Sebastian Carroway and multiple chests.

act_3_step_5.title: Travel to The Venom Crypts
act_3_step_5.description: Use the waypoint to travel to The Venom Crypts, where you'll search for the venom phial needed for a quest.

objectives.text: Use the waypoint to travel to The Venom Crypts
objectives.details: From Jungle Ruins, use the waypoint to travel to The Venom Crypts.

act_3_step_6.title: Clear Venom Crypts
act_3_step_6.description: Navigate through the Venom Crypts to find the corpse containing the venom phial, a quest item needed for an NPC in town.

objectives.text: Find the corpse containing the venom phial
objectives.details: Search the crypts for a lootable corpse that contains the venom phial quest item.

objectives.text: Portal back to Ziggurat Encampment
objectives.details: After obtaining the venom phial, use a portal to return to town.

objectives.text: Find the hidden room with sarcophagi
objectives.details: Search for a hidden room containing multiple sarcophagi. One of them contains a valuable reward.

act_3_step_7.title: Turn in Venom Phial and Travel to The Azak Bog
act_3_step_7.description: Back at Ziggurat Encampment, turn in the venom phial to Servi for a permanent reward. Then use the waypoint to travel to The Azak Bog.

objectives.text: Turn in the venom phial to Servi
objectives.details: Speak with Servi and give her the venom phial. The reward is permanent and cannot be changed later, so choose carefully.

objectives.text: Use the waypoint to travel to The Azak Bog
objectives.details: Travel to The Azak Bog using the waypoint you discovered earlier.

act_3_step_8.title: Clear Azak Bog
act_3_step_8.description: Azak Bog contains the boss Ignagduk who guards a spirit reward. Optionally complete the Flameskin ritual for temporary buffs before the fight.

objectives.text: Complete the Flameskin ritual
objectives.details: Grants 25% fire resistance and increased rarity for the rest of the zone. Complete it if you find it before the boss, but don't backtrack for it.

objectives.text: Defeat Ignagduk
objectives.details: Find and kill Ignagduk to receive 30 spirit as a permanent reward.

objectives.text: Portal back to town and turn in the quest to Servi
objectives.details: Return to Ziggurat Encampment and speak with Servi to turn in the quest.

objectives.text: Use the waypoint to travel to Chimeral Wetlands
objectives.details: Travel to Chimeral Wetlands using the waypoint you discovered earlier.

act_3_step_9.title: Navigate Chimeral Wetlands
act_3_step_9.description: The Chimeral Wetlands contains a Trial of Chaos and a chimera boss guarding the entrance to Juquani's Machinarium. Discover the trial and defeat the boss to proceed.

objectives.text: Find the Trial of Chaos entrance and take the waypoint
objectives.details: Locate the trial entrance, enter to activate the waypoint, then return to the Wetlands. You can complete the trial at any point from now on.

objectives.text: Defeat the chimera boss
objectives.details: Follow the left-hand border of the zone to find the chimera boss.

objectives.text: Enter Juquani's Machinarium
objectives.details: The entrance is behind the chimera boss.

objectives.text: Find the Ravaged Camp
objectives.details: A hidden camp in the Chimeral Wetlands containing a few chests.

objectives.text: Find the Toxic Bloom and defeat the Noxious Behemoth
objectives.details: Locate the Toxic Bloom area and defeat the Noxious Behemoth for a reward.

act_3_step_10.title: Navigate Juquani's Machinarium
act_3_step_10.description: Juquani's Machinarium is a puzzle zone where you need to collect soul cores to open doors. Defeat Blackjaw for a resistance reward, then proceed to Juquani's Sanctum.

objectives.text: Find the first small soul core and open the door
objectives.details: The first soul core is located either left or right of where Alva stands. Use it to open the first door.

objectives.text: Find two more small soul cores to open additional doors
objectives.details: There are three soul cores in total, but you only need two. The third door only contains gold and a chest.

objectives.text: Defeat Blackjaw
objectives.details: Find and kill Blackjaw to receive a permanent 10% fire resistance bonus.

objectives.text: Find the exit and proceed to Juquani's Sanctum
objectives.details: Use the checkpoint to return to the exit area, then enter Juquani's Sanctum.

act_3_step_11.title: Clear Juquani's Sanctum
act_3_step_11.description: Juquani's Sanctum is a complex zone with generators that need to be activated using soul cores. Find the cores, power up the generators, defeat the boss Zicoatl, and obtain the large soul core.

objectives.text: Activate the waypoint near the entrance
objectives.details: Don't forget to activate the waypoint right after entering the zone.

objectives.text: Speak with Alva
objectives.details: Talk to Alva to learn about the zone mechanics.

objectives.text: Find two medium soul cores
objectives.details: Soul cores spawn at random locations throughout the zone.

objectives.text: Activate both generators
objectives.details: The generators are always located to the left and right of Alva's position. Use the soul cores to power them.

objectives.text: Return to Alva using the checkpoint
objectives.details: Wait for the second soul core to reach Alva (watch for red lines on the ground) before proceeding.

objectives.text: Defeat Zicoatl, Warden of the Core
objectives.details: Kill Zicoatl and loot the large soul core from its corpse.

objectives.text: Use the waypoint to travel to Infested Barrens
objectives.details: Return to the Infested Barrens to use the large soul core.

act_3_step_12.title: Navigate Matlan Waterways
act_3_step_12.description: Insert the large soul core to open the path to Matlan Waterways. Navigate through the zone by activating levers to control the water flow.

objectives.text: Insert the large soul core and enter Matlan Waterways
objectives.details: Use the large soul core at the mechanism in Infested Barrens to unlock access to Matlan Waterways.

objectives.text: Activate all levers to navigate through the zone
objectives.details: Activate each lever you encounter to control the water flow and open paths. Activate the large lever at the end to complete the zone.

objectives.text: Portal back to Ziggurat Encampment
objectives.details: After completing the waterways, use a portal to return to town.

act_3_step_13.title: Enter The Drowned City
act_3_step_13.description: Back in Ziggurat Encampment, descend the stairs near the well to meet Alva and enter The Drowned City.

objectives.text: Go down the stairs near the well
objectives.details: Find the stairs near the well and The Hooded One, then descend.

objectives.text: Speak with Alva and enter The Drowned City
objectives.details: Talk to Alva, then proceed into The Drowned City.

act_3_step_14.title: Explore The Drowned City
act_3_step_14.description: The Drowned City has two major exits to discover: Molten Vault and Apex of Filth. Find both exits and grab their waypoints before proceeding.

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Molten Vault and take the waypoint
objectives.details: Usually located to the northwest of the zone. Enter, activate the waypoint, then backtrack to The Drowned City. Only needed on first character per league.

objectives.text: Find the exit to the Apex of Filth and take the waypoint
objectives.details: Usually located to the northeast of the zone. Enter, activate the waypoint, then backtrack if this is your first character of the league.

act_3_step_15.title: Clear Molten Vault and Apex of Filth
act_3_step_15.description: Complete both the Molten Vault (to unlock the reforging bench) and the Apex of Filth (to progress the story).

objectives.text: Defeat the boss in Molten Vault
objectives.details: Find and kill the boss, then return to town and speak with Oswald to unlock the reforging bench. Only needed on first character per league.

objectives.text: Defeat the Queen of Filth in Apex of Filth
objectives.details: The zone layout is always a huge spiral (clockwise or counterclockwise). After traveling a full 360° of the spiral, you'll find the boss.

objectives.text: Portal back to Ziggurat Encampment
objectives.details: After defeating the Queen of Filth, use a portal to return to town.

act_3_step_17.title: Travel to Temple of Kopec
act_3_step_17.description: Return to the underground area beneath Ziggurat Encampment. Go down the stairs near the well (where the Hooded One awaits) and enter the Temple of Kopec.

objectives.text: Descend the stairs near the well and enter the Temple of Kopec
objectives.details: Find the stairs near the well where you previously spoke with the Hooded One. The temple entrance is on the opposite side from The Drowned City.

objectives.text: Activate the waypoint upon entering
objectives.details: There should be a waypoint near the temple entrance.

act_3_step_18.title: Clear Temple of Kopec
act_3_step_18.description: The Temple of Kopec is a triangle-shaped zone with intense sunlight that damages you. Climb the stairs to reach the boss area and defeat Ketzuli, High Priest of the Sun.

objectives.text: Navigate the temple by climbing the stairs twice
objectives.details: The temple has a triangular layout. Stairs are always located at the corners of the zone. Climb stairs twice to reach the top level.

objectives.text: Defeat Ketzuli, High Priest of the Sun
objectives.details: Stay in the shade to avoid taking sun damage during the fight.

objectives.text: Portal back to Ziggurat Encampment
objectives.details: After defeating the boss, use a portal to return to town.

act_3_step_19.title: Travel to Utzaal
act_3_step_19.description: After defeating Ketzuli, speak with Alva to unlock access to the upper levels of the ziggurat. Take the elevator up and pass through the gateway to reach Utzaal.

objectives.text: Speak with Alva in Ziggurat Encampment
objectives.details: After defeating Ketzuli, Alva will unlock access to the elevator.

objectives.text: Ride the elevator up to the ziggurat's upper level
objectives.details: The elevator is located near Alva's position.

objectives.text: Pass through the gateway and descend the stairs to enter Utzaal
objectives.details: After the elevator, go through the gateway and then down the stairs to reach Utzaal.

act_3_step_20.title: Clear Utzaal
act_3_step_20.description: Utzaal is a large zone where you need to defeat Viper Napuatzi. The Sacrificial Heart needed for a later ritual may drop here. The boss and exit are both in the northern part of the zone.

objectives.text: Activate the waypoint near the entrance
objectives.details: Don't forget to activate the waypoint right after entering the zone.

objectives.text: Find and defeat Viper Napuatzi
objectives.details: She is always located toward the right side of the zone when facing north.

objectives.text: Look for the Sacrificial Heart while clearing
objectives.details: The heart can randomly drop from enemies in this zone. If you don't find it here, don't worry - it can also drop in Aggorat. Don't farm this zone specifically for it.

objectives.text: Find the exit to Aggorat and enter
objectives.details: The exit is in the top-right area of the zone when facing north.

act_3_step_21.title: Navigate Aggorat and Complete the Ritual
act_3_step_21.description: Aggorat was once the crown jewel of Atziri's empire - the greatest city of the Vaal civilization at its height. Now it lies in ruin, its grand temples reclaimed by the jungle. Navigate the Trial of Atziri using the audio cues that guide your path. Find the exit to Black Chambers and the Sacrificial Table, then complete the heart ritual for skill points.

objectives.text: Follow the voices of the Trial of Atziri through the main plaza
objectives.details: Having game audio enabled is very helpful - the voices guide you to the correct path. Continue until you find a checkpoint.

objectives.text: Find the checkpoint leading to the Black Chambers exit
objectives.details: After the main plaza, the exit is always in the top-left area of the zone.

objectives.text: Find the checkpoint leading to the Sacrificial Table
objectives.details: After the main plaza, the table is always in the top-right area of the zone.

objectives.text: Obtain the Sacrificial Heart if you haven't already
objectives.details: If you didn't find it in Utzaal, continue killing monsters here until it drops. You need it for the ritual.

objectives.text: Use checkpoint to teleport to the Sacrificial Table and complete the ritual
objectives.details: Loot the sacrificial dagger, place the heart on the table, then stab it to complete the ritual.

objectives.text: Use checkpoint to teleport to the Black Chambers entrance and enter
objectives.details: After completing the ritual, use the checkpoint to reach the Black Chambers exit and proceed.

act_3_step_22.title: Defeat Doryani and Complete Act 3
act_3_step_22.description: The Black Chambers lie at the apex of Aggorat's great pyramid - the heart of Doryani's Machinarium, where the Royal Thaumaturge conducts his twisted experiments with soul cores and Vaal technology. Defeat Doryani, then witness the cataclysm that follows and speak with NPCs to travel to Act 4.

objectives.text: Find and defeat Doryani, Royal Thaumaturge
objectives.details: Doryani's location depends on the zone entry angle - he'll be in either the top-left or top-right area of the zone.

objectives.text: Take the portal back to the encampment
objectives.details: After defeating Doryani, a portal opens to return to town.

objectives.text: Speak with Doryani and witness the cataclysm
objectives.details: Talk to Doryani in the encampment, watch the event unfold, then speak with him again.

objectives.text: Speak with The Hooded One and then Alva to travel to Kingsmarch
objectives.details: After the events, talk to The Hooded One and then Alva to complete Act 3 and travel to Act 4.

act_4_step_1.title: Obtain Boat Charter and Travel to Whakapanu Island
act_4_step_1.description: Welcome to Ngamakanui - a region of scattered islands accessible only by ship. Unlike previous acts, Act 4 lets you choose which islands to explore and in what order. Each island contains a self-contained story with its own challenges and rewards. Speak with the NPCs in the port city of Kingsmarch to obtain your boat charter, then select Whakapanu Island to begin your adventures.

objectives.text: Speak with required NPCs to get Boat Charter
objectives.details: Talk to Doryani, then to Alva to receive the boat charter. Then talk with Tujen, Ange, Kanu and finally with Makoru to select an island to travel to.

act_4_step_2.title: Explore Whakapanu Island and Enter Singing Caverns
act_4_step_2.description: Search Whakapanu Island for the Singing Caverns entrance while completing optional encounters for additional rewards.

objectives.text: Find and enter the Singing Caverns
objectives.details: Located approximately on the far end of the island compared to the start point.

objectives.text: Find the crabshell cavern and defeat the rare
objectives.details: Can be found alongside the beach part of the zone.

objectives.text: Find the Shark Pit and defeat the Great White One
objectives.details: Can be found across the island on another beach. Trigger the fight by moving close to the water between the gaps in the rock formation.

objectives.text: Find and loot the Petrified Pirate
objectives.details: The pirate corpse is hidden randomly in the zone.

act_4_step_3.title: Complete Singing Caverns and Travel to Shrike Island
act_4_step_3.description: Defeat Diamora in the Chamber of Echoes and complete optional encounters, then proceed to Shrike Island.

objectives.text: Find the Chamber of Echoes and kill Diamora
objectives.details: Find the Chamber of Echoes and kill Diamora. Then return to the ship and go to Shrike Island.

objectives.text: Find the Beckoning Clam
objectives.details: Optional objective within the Singing Caverns.

act_4_step_4.title: Complete Shrike Island and Travel to Abandoned Prison
act_4_step_4.description: Defeat the Scourge of the Skies by destroying corrupted nests, speak with Matiki, then travel to the Abandoned Prison.

objectives.text: Find the corrupted nests and kill the Scourge of the Skies
objectives.details: Find the corrupted nests and kill the Scourge of the Skies.

objectives.text: Speak with Matiki
objectives.details: After defeating the Scourge, talk to Matiki before leaving the island.

objectives.text: Find the map piece on the dead sailor
objectives.details: Search for a dead sailor's corpse hidden on the island containing a map piece.

objectives.text: Travel to Abandoned Prison
objectives.details: Return to the ship and travel to Abandoned Prison.

act_4_step_5.title: Obtain Chapel Key and Enter Solitary Confinement
act_4_step_5.description: Defeat monsters to obtain the Chapel Key, then clear the chapel area and proceed to Solitary Confinement.

objectives.text: Find the Chapel Key and clear the Chapel
objectives.details: Kill monsters until the Chapel Key drops. Open the Chapel Door and kill the rare and its minions.
rewards: 30% increased Mana or Life Recovery from Flasks

objectives.text: Enter Solitary Confinement
objectives.details: Find the exit and enter Solitary Confinement.

objectives.text: Find the Armament
objectives.details: A hidden area in the Abandoned Prison containing multiple chests.

act_4_step_6.title: Complete Solitary Confinement and Travel to Isle of Kin
act_4_step_6.description: Defeat The Prisoner and optionally encounter Bronnach the Manhunter for additional rewards, then proceed to Isle of Kin.

objectives.text: Find and kill The Prisoner
objectives.details: Find and kill The Prisoner, then travel to Isle of Kin.

objectives.text: Find and kill Bronnach, the Manhunter
objectives.details: Bronnach is a Rogue Exile

act_4_step_7.title: Complete Isle of Kin and Travel to Volcanic Warrens
act_4_step_7.description: Defeat The Blind Beast in the Primal Arena and complete optional encounters, then proceed to Volcanic Warrens.

objectives.text: Find the Primal Arena and kill The Blind Beast
Find and enter Volcanic Warrens
Find dead sailor to get Torn Map Piece

act_4_step_8.title: Complete Volcanic Warrens and Return to Kingsmarch
act_4_step_8.description: Defeat Krutog, Lord of Kin at the Tyrant's Throne, then speak with Matiki before returning to Kingsmarch.

objectives.text: Find the Tyrant's Throne and kill Krutog, Lord of Kin
objectives.details: Find the Tyrant's Throne and kill Krutog, Lord of Kin. Then speak to Matiki before returning to Kingsmarch.

act_4_step_9.title: Talk to everyone then embark for Eye of Hinekora
act_4_step_9.description: Complete the Kingsmarch quest, then travel to Eye of Hinekora.

objectives.text: Turn in quests, talk to everyone then use the boat to navigate to Eye of Hinekora

act_4_step_10.title: Complete Eye of Hinekora and Enter Hall of the Dead
act_4_step_10.description: Navigate through the cavern, complete tests of mettle, find the Silent Hall, and proceed to the Hall of the Dead.

objectives.text: Find the Silent Hall and pay your respects
objectives.details: The level is pretty linear, keep an eye out for offshoots to find the Silent Hall.
objectives.notes: The Silent Hall is generally found after the 3rd Test of Mettle.

objectives.text: Find and enter the Hall of the Dead
objectives.details: Progress through the cavern and complete each 'test of mettle' encounter

objectives.text: Find the rare chest hidden behind a waterfall
objectives.details: There is a rare chest hidden behind a waterfall.

act_4_step_11.title: Complete Hall of the Dead and Enter Trial of the Ancestors
act_4_step_11.description: Complete the three tests of blank tattoos, defeat Yama the White, and obtain the silver coin to proceed to the Trial of the Ancestors.

objectives.text: Kill Yama the White and enter the Trial of the Ancestors
objectives.details: Find Yama's Test to defeat Yama the White. Then loot the silver coin.

objectives.text: Find the three tests to look blank tattoos and turn in at their respective totems
objectives.details: They are found on the way to Yama the White.

act_4_step_12.title: Obtain Tattoo of Hinekora and Travel to Arastas
act_4_step_12.description: Speak with Navali to obtain the Tattoo of Hinekora, then return to the ship and navigate to Arastas.

objectives.text: Talk to Navali and get the Tattoo of Hinekora
objectives.details: Afterwards return to the ship and navigate to Arastas

act_4_step_13.title: Complete Arastas and Travel to The Excavation
act_4_step_13.description: Follow Missionary Lorandis, defeat Torvian, Hand of the Saviour, and complete optional encounters before proceeding to The Excavation.

objectives.text: Talk to Missionary Lorandis, then kill Torvian, Hand of the Saviour, then exit to The Excavation
objectives.details: Follow Missionary Lorandis into the church, then exit again. Destroy the forcefield with any attack or spell. Find the Excavated Pit and kill Torvian, Hand of the Saviour.

objectives.text: Loot the Evening and Morning Bell

act_4_step_14.title: Complete The Excavation and Return to Kingsmarch
act_4_step_14.description: Defeat Benedictus, First Herald of Utopia at the Precursor Forge, witness lore events, and complete optional encounters before returning to Kingsmarch.

objectives.text: Find the Precursor Forge and Defeat Benedictus, First Heral of Utopia
objectives.details: After killing Benedictus, First Heral of Utopia, witness the lore events then return to Kingsmarch.

objectives.text: Witness lore events. After talk to The Hooded One then portal to Kingsmarch
Find the Excavated cache

act_4_step_15.title: Explore Kedge Bay
act_4_step_15.description: Travel to Kedge Bay to investigate the ghostly shipwreck known as Journey's End. This haunted vessel holds secrets about the Verisium needed to free a trapped soul.

objectives.text: Travel to Kedge Bay
objectives.details: Use the ship to sail to Kedge Bay.

objectives.text: Find and enter Journey's End
objectives.details: Explore Kedge Bay and locate the entrance to the ghostly shipwreck Journey's End.

objectives.text: Find the corpse on the beach and loot the map piece
objectives.details: Search the beach for a dead sailor's corpse containing a map piece.

act_4_step_15a.title: Clear Journey's End
act_4_step_15a.description: Journey's End is a haunted shipwreck where the ghost of Captain Hartlin guards the Verisium. Speak with Tujen to learn about the situation, then confront and defeat the captain to claim the precious material.

objectives.text: Speak to Tujen
objectives.details: Find Tujen aboard the ship and learn about Captain Hartlin and the Verisium.

objectives.text: Find the Captain's Chair
objectives.details: Navigate through the ship to locate the Captain's Chair where Hartlin awaits.

objectives.text: Defeat Captain Hartlin
objectives.details: Battle and defeat the ghostly Captain Hartlin.

objectives.text: Pick up the Verisium
objectives.details: Loot the Verisium from Captain Hartlin's remains.

objectives.text: Portal back to Kingsmarch
objectives.details: Return to town with the Verisium to have it crafted into something useful.

act_4_step_15a2.title: Craft Verisium Spikes
act_4_step_15a2.description: Danig in Kingsmarch can forge the Verisium into spikes capable of breaking the magical prison holding Freya Hartlin captive aboard Journey's End.

objectives.text: Talk to Danig to craft the Verisium Spikes
objectives.details: Give the Verisium to Danig the blacksmith and he will forge it into Verisium Spikes.

objectives.text: Return to Journey's End
objectives.details: Use the waypoint to travel back to Journey's End with the spikes.

act_4_step_15a3.title: Free Freya Hartlin
act_4_step_15a3.description: Freya Hartlin, the captain's daughter, is trapped in a magical prison aboard Journey's End. Use the Verisium Spikes to shatter her bonds, but be prepared - freeing her will trigger waves of ghostly defenders.

objectives.text: Speak to Freya Hartlin
objectives.details: Find and speak with the imprisoned Freya Hartlin to learn about her plight.

objectives.text: Drive the Verisium Spikes into the pillars
objectives.details: Use the Verisium Spikes on each of the pillars that form Freya's magical cage to break the enchantment.

objectives.text: Defeat the waves of ghostly enemies
objectives.details: Breaking the prison triggers waves of ghostly defenders. Survive and defeat them all to complete the rescue.

objectives.text: Portal back to Kingsmarch
objectives.details: With Freya freed, return to Kingsmarch to collect your reward.

act_4_step_15b.title: Talk with all NPCs then travel to Ngakanu
act_4_step_15b.description: After recovering the weapon meant to defeat the Beast, the Kauri leader Tavakai has taken it for himself and succumbed to its power. You must track him down and stop him.

objectives.text: Talk to Tujen
objectives.details: Speak with Tujen in Kingsmarch to receive a reward.

objectives.text: Talk with the new captain and set sail for Ngakanu
objectives.details: Speak with the NPCs in Kingsmarch to learn about Tavakai's betrayal, then board the ship to Ngakanu.

act_4_step_16.title: Complete Ngakanu and Enter Heart of the Tribe
act_4_step_16.description: Navigate Ngakanu Island, find the Heart of the Tribe, and complete optional encounters for additional lore.

objectives.text: Find and enter the Heart of the Tribe
Find the Medicine Circle, kill the monsters and talk to Kaimana

act_4_step_17.title: Complete Heart of the Tribe and Return to Kingsmarch
act_4_step_17.description: Find the Sacred Interior, defeat Tavakai in the final boss encounter, witness the aftermath, then return to Kingsmarch.

objectives.text: Find the Sacred Interior
objectives.details: Navigate through Heart of the Tribe to find the Sacred Interior.

objectives.text: Defeat Tavakai
objectives.details: Fight and defeat the corrupted Kauri leader.

objectives.text: Witness the lore events and speak with Tavakai
objectives.details: After defeating Tavakai, watch the lore events unfold and speak with him.

objectives.text: Return to Kingsmarch
objectives.details: Portal back to Kingsmarch.

act_4_step_18.title: Begin the Interlude and Travel to The Refuge
act_4_step_18.description: Speak with the Hooded One to begin the interlude sequence and proceed through the linear path to The Refuge, completing Act 4.

objectives.text: Talk to the Hooded One, journey to the The Refuge in the interlude
objectives.details: This is the end of act 4. The interlude is very linear, without optional steps, just clear it in any order.
